title: Biometric Privacy Tradeoff
html: Stub. Biometrics can either erode privacy (linking identities across databases, leaking medical info from retinal scans) or enforce it (locking credit cards to your fingerprint, restricting medical-record access to the patient). Which one wins depends on legislation and template encryption. First mentioned in 2025 04 27 biometrics privacy security summary.

related.label: Biometrics survey — iris, keystroke, palmprint, retina, signature, voice
